title: Applicability of general corporation laws
doc_html:
§86.  Applicability of general corporation laws

The provisions of Title 12, Chapter 1, and all powers and rights thereunder, apply to the associations organized hereunder, except where such provisions are in conflict with, or inconsistent with, the express provisions of this Part.
doc_text:
§86.  Applicability of general corporation laws
The provisions of Title 12, Chapter 1, and all powers and rights thereunder, apply to the associations organized hereunder, except where such provisions are in conflict with, or inconsistent with, the express provisions of this Part.
